children.text: Alphabet posted earnings of $5.43 billion, up 29% from last year, with no noticeable dent from the recent YouTube ad placement controversy—which had brands pulling their commercials from the platform because they were running alongside objectionable content.
Amazon’s net profits rose 41% to $724 million, as cloud computing gains outweighed higher shipping and entertainment costs.
Ready for the other results? We’ll summarize them like this:

🤑 = made of money

😀 = doin’ fine

😐 = meh

😰 = been better

😱 = $&@#!
